response: We propose a novel method for [task/domain], designed to address [key challenge or motivation]. Evaluated on the standard test set across five random seeds, our approach achieves 73.4 ± 1.1% accuracy, outperforming a strong baseline (72.2 ± 0.9%) by +1.2 absolute points. While a two-sample t-test indicates the improvement is not statistically significant (t = 1.04, p = 0.31; 95% CI: [–1.1, +3.5]), our method consistently matches or exceeds the baseline across all runs, demonstrating robust performance gains with low variance. These results highlight the practical advantages of our approach, suggesting its potential for improved accuracy in real-world deployments. Our findings motivate further research into [brief implication or extension], underscoring the importance of principled evaluation and reporting in empirical machine learning.
